structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-05 New Broker Investor: Acra Lending
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-05 16:11:36-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

NOVA is pleased to announce our new brokered partner, Acra Lending!  Acra Lending specializes in alternative income products, such as bank statements, asset depletion, and VOE programs.

Here is a brief overview of their available programs:

 

Bank Statements

*	12 or 24 months
*	Self-employed and 1099
*	Max 90% LTV

DSCR

*	No income or job verification
*	Min 600 Fico
*	Loan amounts up to $3M

Foreign National

*	Loan Amounts up to $3M
*	No income, job or credit required
*	Non-owner occupied only

Jumbo Non-QM

*	$4M to 10MM case-by-case
*	Qualify with all programs
*	Foreign Nationals accepted

 

When using this investor, you must select Borrower Paid Compensation (minimum of 2%*).  Lender Paid is not available.

 

*subject to points and fees limits

 

Please join the Product Presentation on Wednesday May 14th 2PM AZ Time to learn more.  Training has already sent the invitation.

 

AE Contact:

Josh Levine

Wholesale Lending

(626) 797-8276

Josh.Levine@AcraLending.com <mailto:Josh.Levine@AcraLending.com> 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
